Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Amendment To Trust And Instruments; Termination Of Trustees; And For Accounting
Off Calendar Apr-09-2019 Continued To Jun-03-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Nader Fannyan for Caroline Despanie and Clifton Despanie (Respondents).

Mr. Fannyan stated that he hasn't heard from opposing Counsel, that he is ready to set the matter for trial, that he has conducted discovery, that they completed mandatory settlement conference and that it will be a two day trial. The Petition to Determine Validity of Purported Amendment to Trust and Instruments; Termination of Trustees and for Accounting is set for trial in the Department of the Presiding Judge (206) on June 3, 2019 at 9:30 a.m., (order for the same signed in open court). A copy of the order and notice of trial will be provided to Counsel.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Amendment To Trust And Instruments; Termination Of Trustees; And For Accounting
Off Calendar Jan-29-2019 Continued To Apr-09-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Amendment To Trust And Instruments; Termination Of Trustees; And For Accounting
Off Calendar Dec-04-2018 Continued To Jan-29-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Robert Cross for Sabrina Butler (Petitioner).
Nader Fannyan for Carolyn Despanie and Clifton Despanie (Respondents).

Mr. Cross stated that they have some discovery (couple of depositions) to complete, that it should be done by the end of January and that the matter will then be ready to be set for trial. Mr. Fannyan stated that they sent interrogatories and a request for production of documents, that adequate responses have not been provided and that he has set a meet and confer to resolve that issue. The Petition to Determine Validity of Purported Amendment to Trust and Instruments, etc. is continued to January 29, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: F. Ruiz. Not reported.

Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Amendment To Trust And Instruments; Termination Of Trustees; And For Accounting
Off Calendar Oct-09-2018 Continued To Dec-04-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Robert Cross for Sabrina Butler (Petitioner).
Nader Fannyan for Clifton Despanie and Carolyn Despanie (Respondents/Co-Trustees).

Counsel reported that the Parties are working towards settlement. The Court stated that it is prepared to refer the matter to Commissioner Pang Ly for a settlement conference, informed Counsel that Ms. Ly will require that their Clients be present, and ordered the Parties to contact Commissioner Ly and set up a time. The Petition to Determine Validity of Purported Amendment to Trust, etc. is continued to December 4, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Parties are to have met and conferred by that date, and provide a joint status conference statement by November 28, 2018.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Amendment To Trust And Instruments; Termination Of Trustees; And For Accounting
Off Calendar Jul-10-2018 Continued To Oct-09-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Robert Cross for Petitioner
Nader Fannyan for Respondent

Mr. Cross stated they had a half day mediation with Ms. Pantazis with no progress, that the next step is some discovery, and request the trial be set 2 months out. Mr. Fannyan requested that the trial be set 6 months out. Mr. Cross added that 90 days is adequate time unless there are vacation conflicts with clients. The Petition to Determine Validity of Purported Amendment to Trust, etc. is continued to October 9, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Parties/Counsel to deliver courtesy copies to the Court, meet and confer on how the case will go forward, a joint status filed by October 2, 2018 stating issues to be resolved, length of trial, exhibits and witness lists.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Amendment To Trust And Instruments; Termination Of Trustees; And For Accounting
Off Calendar Apr-10-2018 Continued To Jul-10-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Cross for Sabrina Butler (Petitioner)
Clinton Killian for Objector/Co-Trustees

Mr. Cross stated that he filed a status report, agreed to by Mr. Killian requesting an additional 60-90 days, requested to go before a settlement conference judge. The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than June 19, 2018. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by June 22, 2018. The Petition to Determine Validity of Purported Amendment to Trust, etc. is continued to and the Parties are to return on July 10, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le, Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Amendment To Trust And Instruments; Termination Of Trustees; And For Accounting
Off Calendar Mar-20-2018 Continued To Apr-10-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
